Saab gets $37 million order for more Live Training equipment from U.S. Marine Corps.
news.summary: Saab, based in Stockholm, announced on March 14, 2025, that they were granted a contract modification by the U.S. Marine Corps. This contract is for additional Marine Corps Training Instrumentation Systems (MCTIS) equipment and has a value of USD $37 million (SEK 375 million). The deliveries for this equipment are scheduled to be completed within a specified timeframe.

Third Avenue Real Estate Value Fund wins Best Global Real Estate Fund honors at 2025 LSEG Lipper Funds Awards in US.
news.summary: Third Avenue Management LLC revealed that the Third Avenue Real Estate Value Fund attained recognition at the 2025 LSEG Lipper Funds Awards in the United States. The Fund was honored as the Best Global Real Estate Fund Over Three Years and the Best Global Real Estate Fund Over Five Years. The Lipper Fund Awards, known for over 30 years for highlighting robust risk-adjusted performance, showcased the Fund's outstanding achievements.

news.headline: Nasdaq gains 1.5%, Ultima Beauty's upbeat results. Dow at 40,939.35, NASDAQ at 17,562.15, S&P 500 at 5,573.84.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw a positive start today, with the Nasdaq Composite showing a notable increase of approximately 1.5% on Friday. At the opening of the market on Friday, the Dow rose by 0.31% to 40,939.35, while the NASDAQ surged by 1.50% to 17,562.15. The S&P 500 also experienced growth, climbing by 0.95% to 5,573.84. Information technology shares were among the top performers, gaining 1.9% on Friday, while consumer staples shares saw a slight decline of 0.5% in trading that day. Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULTA) reported better-than-expected financial results for the fourth quarter, projecting revenue between $11.5 billion to $11.6 billion for fiscal year 2025, slightly below estimates of $11.67 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stock markets rebound as Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq open stronger on last day of turbulent week.
German Greens' Droege: We have not yet done a trial vote with lawmakers.
Permanent Portfolio Funds, managed by Pacific Heights Asset Management, won three 2025 LSEG Lipper Fund Awards.
news.summary: In San Francisco on March 14, 2025, Pacific Heights Asset Management, LLC, the investment adviser for the Permanent Portfolio Family of Funds, proudly revealed that its main fund, the Permanent Portfolio®, has been honored with three prestigious 2025 LSEG Lipper Fund Awards. These accolades recognize the fund's unwavering performance and success.

Kazakhstan raises oil exports via Baku-Tbilisi-Ceyhan by 38% in February from January to 97,300 tons, oil exports via Atasu-Alashankou pipeline to China down 9% in February from January to 73,685 tons - Kaztransoil.

Crypto market facing significant downturn in 2025, not worst cycle as some think. Bitcoin tumbles 18%, $4.6B pulled from exchange-traded products. Current market seen as opportunity for long-term gain by some, despite pessimism. Bullish sentiment remains.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market has experienced a downturn in 2025 following Bitcoin's all-time high above $106,000 in December 2024. The total crypto market capitalization plummeted by 25% after Trump's inauguration, with Bitcoin dropping more than 18%. Investors offloaded around $4.6 billion from crypto exchange-traded products and saw $1 billion in liquidations in a single day on March 3. However, this sell-off is not the most brutal on record; the collapse of Mt. Gox in 2014-2015 led to an 85% drawdown in Bitcoin's market with no institutional support. Despite the current market state, industry experts remain bullish, citing advancements in global crypto products and regulations. Some even consider the current cycle the best, as prices are rising without excessive money printing, leading to long-term gains. Analysts suggest that the traditional market terms may not apply to the current scenario, signifying a different landscape in the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Germany January current account surplus €11.766B, Revised 20.9B.
Subaru wins 3 IIHS Top Safety Pick awards with Solterra earning TOP SAFETY PICK+ including Ascent and Forester.
news.summary: By 2025, IIHS implemented stricter criteria for revised moderate overlap front crash evaluations. The Subaru Solterra was awarded the prestigious IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK+ for meeting the highest safety standards. Additionally, the Subaru Ascent and Forester achieved the IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK recognition. Among these models, the new Subaru Forester Hybrid was included in the accolades. As of March 2025, Subaru has maintained its commitment to safety and recognition by the IIHS.

This initiative aims to celebrate the excitement of travel while connecting with the inquisitiveness of Silversea's guests through genuine and emotive experiences. The unveiling of this new brand focus took place on March 14, 2025, in Miami.

news.headline: SEALSQ invests $20 million in Quantum & AI Startups via SEALQUANTUM.com initiative for innovation. NASDAQ: LAES Company.
news.summary: SEALSQ Corp, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker LAES, has revealed significant advancements since the recent introduction of SEALQUANTUM.com. SEALSQ has earmarked a substantial sum of up to $20 million for funding innovative startups that focus on Quantum Computing, Quantum-as-a-Service (QaaS), and semiconductor technologies driven by artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Forte Minerals CEO to present at Swiss Mining Institute Investment Conference; first time for the company's president.
news.summary: Patrick Elliott, the President and CEO of Forte Minerals Corp., is scheduled to make his debut appearance at the esteemed Swiss Mining Institute (SMI) where he will be presenting for the first time.

news.headline: Cavco consolidates brand strategy for affordable housing market, simplifying homebuying journey.
news.summary: Cavco's strategic brand alignment has bolstered its standing in the affordable housing sector and has streamlined the process for homebuyers. This move has significantly enhanced Cavco's presence in the market and made purchasing a home more convenient for customers.

news.headline: Bitcoin-gold ratio breaks 12-year support with gold at $3K. BTC down 11% YTD, gold up 12.80% YTD. Gold ETFs see $23.18B inflows, BTC ETFs outflows at $1.46B YTD. Macro uncertainty and trade policy fears fuel gold prices. Bitcoin may face 40% price decline.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) broke a 12-year rising support trendline against gold (XAU) on March 14, potentially signaling the end of its bull run. Gold hit a record high above $3,000 per ounce with a 12.80% year-to-date rise, while Bitcoin dropped by 11% in 2025. US-based gold ETFs attracted over $6.48 billion YTD, while Bitcoin ETFs saw $1.46 billion in outflows. The divergence is linked to macroeconomic uncertainty and trade policies. Central banks' gold purchases and global economic fears have boosted gold prices. The BTC/XAU ratio breakdown correlates with historical patterns and could lead Bitcoin to a potential downside target near $34,850 if the bearish trend continues. Financial analysts see this as a correction within a bull market, but a break below a certain threshold could push Bitcoin into bear market territory. Every investment move involves risk, and readers are advised to conduct their own research before making any decisions.

news.headline: Cadiz to present at 37th Annual ROTH Conference in LA. CEO to join water panel. Stock symbols: CDZI / CDZIP.
news.summary: CEO Susan Kennedy from Cadiz, Inc. is set to join a panel on water infrastructure at a conference in Los Angeles on March 14, 2025. news.summary: Federated Hermes MDT Advisers has received awards for several funds across various performance periods. Two of their active fixed-income strategies were acknowledged for outperforming their category consistently through market cycles. The recognition was granted on March 14, 2025, in Pittsburgh. news.summary: For the second consecutive year, Greif has been honored with the prestigious Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award (GEWA) for maintaining a top-tier workplace environment.

news.headline: Healthcare Integrated Technologies Inc. secures $10 million in friends & family funding for growth, aiming for NYSE listing.
news.summary: Healthcare Integrated Technologies Inc., a renowned global leader in AI-driven safety and monitoring solutions based in Knoxville, TN, recently disclosed the successful closure of a $10 million capital raise on March 14, 2025. The company, traded under the symbol HITC on the OTC Pink market, stated that this significant fundraise is intended to support its strategic growth plans. Among these plans is the continued endeavor to fulfill the listing criteria for the NYSE American stock exchange.

news.headline: Ethereum stable ahead of Hooli testnet for Pectra upgrade. Mainnet possible by April 25 after successful testing.
news.summary: A significant upgrade for Ethereum, considered the largest since The Merge, is moving into a new testing stage. Should Hooli prove effective, the Pectra upgrade might be implemented on the mainnet as soon as April 25th.

news.headline: Chemours, NTT DATA, and Hibiya Engineering trial Opteon 2P50 fluid to cut data center cooling energy use by 90%.
news.summary: Chemours Company (NYSE:CC) has initiated a product trial alongside NTT DATA and Hibiya Engineering, Ltd. to enhance data center two-phase immersion cooling. The trial introduces Opteon 2P50 dielectric fluid by Chemours, aiming to revolutionize cooling methods with innovative technology. Opteon 2P50 boasts an exceptional ultra-low global warming potential of 10 (AR6) and surpasses traditional cooling technologies. This cutting-edge fluid has the potential to decrease data center cooling energy usage by up to 90% and lower overall energy consumption by 40%. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Diversified Energy Company PLC finalizes $1.3B acquisition of Maverick Natural Resources.
news.summary: Diversified Energy Company PLC has successfully finalized the acquisition of Maverick Natural Resources for $1.3 billion, as previously disclosed.

news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Rochester, New York, Vuzix® Corporation (NASDAQ: VUZI) disclosed that Moviynt®, its wholly-owned subsidiary, is a prominent provider of AI-enhanced smart glasses, waveguides, and Augmented Reality (AR) solutions. Vuzix is recognized as a key player in this industry, showcasing innovative products and technologies.

news.headline: SoundHound AI will showcase voice AI innovations at 2025 NVIDIA GTC, focusing on automotive industry advancements.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN), known for voice artificial intelligence, will be at the 2025 NVIDIA GPU Technology Conference from March 17-21 in San Jose. They will be at Booth #1842 showcasing voice AI advancements impacting the automotive sector and enhancing in-car interactions. Visitors can anticipate demonstrations of a next-generation in-vehicle voice assistant at the booth.

news.headline: 2025 recession bets are rising; US economy faces 37% chance of recession. $100 bet could yield $243 if recession happens. Fed could cut rates 3 times in 2025.
news.summary: There has been a sharp increase in wagers on a U.S. recession in 2025 due to softer economic data and cautious economist outlooks. The likelihood of a recession in the U.S. this year stands at 37%, according to Kalshi. Betting on a "yes" outcome for a recession this year could yield $243 on a $100 wager. Analysts like David Morrison from Trade Nation suggest that economic growth is expected to slow, possibly leading to a recession in 2025. The Atlanta Federal Reserve's GDPNow model forecasts a 2.4% contraction in the first quarter, a significant turnaround from the 2.3% expansion in the fourth quarter of 2024. Traders are anticipating three 25-basis-point rate cuts from the Federal Reserve in 2025 in response to these concerns.

news.headline: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial raises $590M through token sales with 5 billion WLFI tokens sold, 63% total supply expected for future sales.
news.summary: World Liberty Financial, a decentralized finance project linked with former U.S. President Donald Trump, has successfully raised $550 million in its most recent token sale. This latest fundraising effort has brought the project's total funding to $590 million. The primary focus of World Liberty Financial is to promote dollar-backed stablecoins and develop decentralized financial applications. In the recent token sale, the project sold 5 billion WLFI tokens, accounting for 25 percent of its overall 100 billion token supply. Co-founder Zak Folkman stated that the project plans to release an additional 63 percent of its total token supply in upcoming sales. The initiative initiated a public sale in October 2024, during which it sold 20 billion tokens at a price of 1.5 cents per token. The project's continued success and fundraising efforts are highlighted in a detailed article available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: RLJ Lodging Trust declares $0.15 dividend per common share, payable on April 15, 2025, and $0.4875 on Series A Preferred Shares.
news.summary: RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE: RLJ) based in Bethesda, Md., has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common share, payable on April 15, 2025, for shareholders of record as of March 31, 2025. Additionally, a quarterly cash dividend of $0.4875 has been declared on the Company’s Series A Preferred Shares, payable on April 30, 2025, for shareholders of record as of March.

news.headline: QuickLogic will showcase its Australis™ eFPGA IP Generator at GOMACTech 2025 event in Pasadena, CA.
news.summary: Today, QuickLogic Corporation, a top supplier of embedded FPGA (eFPGA) Hard IP and ruggedized FPGAs, revealed their plan to showcase at GOMACTech 2025. The expo is set to take place at the Pasadena Convention Center in Pasadena, CA. This news was announced from the headquarters in SAN JOSE, Calif., on March 14, 2025. QuickLogic Corporation is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol QUIK.

news.headline: Pearl launches Claimcheck to automate insurance claims, boost revenue for dental offices, using AI to reduce errors.
news.summary: A company based in Los Angeles, known as Pearl and recognized as a global leader in dental AI solutions, revealed a new innovation named Claimcheck. This tool, powered by artificial intelligence, aims to enhance the efficiency of insurance claim submissions within dental practices by minimizing mistakes and speeding up revenue flow. Through integration with current dental practice management systems, Claimcheck offers instant validation of claim submissions. By utilizing Pearl's cutting-edge AI technology, the tool can promptly identify potential errors and compile evidence to support claims.

news.headline: Lighthouse introduces AI for Review suite for complex eDiscovery cases in Seattle, aiding in large-volume matters.
news.summary: In Seattle, Lighthouse has introduced a new product called Lighthouse AI for Review, which is a collection of services designed for addressing scenarios frequently encountered in high-volume, intricate, time-critical situations.

news.headline: Nasdaq extends HUB Cyber Security’s bid price compliance deadline to April 14, 2025, following review of developments.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on March 14, 2025, HUB Cyber Security Ltd. (NASDAQ: HUBC) disclosed that they have been granted a 14-day extension by the Nasdaq Hearings Panel to demonstrate adherence to the minimum bid price rule. The company has until April 14, 2025, to attain 10 sequential trading days with a minimum share price of $1. HUB is a leading global entity in confidential computing and advanced secured data fabric technology.

news.headline: Heidmar expands services to include commercial management for offshore sector, secures 5-year contract for PSV in North Sea.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Heidmar Maritime Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: HMR) revealed its new venture into commercial management services for the offshore sector, expanding its service portfolio. The company secured a client for a five-year contract where it will provide a platform supply vessel (PSV) along with a crew for supply tours in the North Sea. Additionally, the contract includes three optional one-year extensions for continued services.

news.headline: CAVA opens first restaurant in Fishers, IN with 40-seat dining room, 3,000 sq.ft location open 10:45am-10pm, serves Mediterranean-inspired dishes.
news.summary: In Washington, CAVA, a Mediterranean fast-casual restaurant brand traded on NYSE under CAVA, has launched their inaugural restaurant in the Indianapolis metropolitan area. Situated at 11594 Whistle Drive, Suite 150, Fishers, IN 46037, the restaurant's operating hours are from 10:45 a.m. until 10:00 p.m. Covering a 3,000-square-foot area, CAVA Fishers accommodates 40 diners and features digital order pick-up and delivery services. The menu highlights Mediterranean-style bowls, pitas, dips, and dressings, offering a flavorful dining experience.

news.headline: Williams-Sonoma to release Q4 results on March 19th, 2025 before market open. Conference call set for 10:00 AM ET. Replay available at 12:00 PM ET.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (WSM) will unveil its fourth quarter figures on March 19, 2025, before markets open. The Company will hold a conference call at 10:00 AM Eastern Time accessible at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events post the wire service announcement. news.headline: Trump's tariffs may raise new car prices by $4,000+. Used cars could also see a price hike. Consumers facing a tough situation.
news.summary: One estimate suggests that the prices of new cars could jump by $4,000 or higher, potentially leading to a surge in the cost of used cars as well. An expert described the scenario as chaotic for consumers.
